conservative.name: Swarm of Filth
conservative.requirements: You and at least 1 filth-encrusted disease-ridden ally must be engaged with the target

success.description: The attack inflicts normal damage, +1 damage for every 3 allies in the engagement
As above, and the target makes a Disease 1 check with an additional for every 2 of your allies in the engagement or becomes infected by a disease with the Contact, Filth, or Wound traits

boon.description: +1 damage for every 3 allies in the engagement

chaosStar.description: You and each of your allies in the engagement suffer 1 wound

reckless.name: Swarm of Filth
reckless.requirements:
Used By: Nurglings
Multiple nurslings engaged with target

success.description: The attack inflicts normal damage, +1 damage for every 3 nurglings in the engagement
The attack inflicts critical damage, +1 damage for every 2 nurglings in the engagement

boon.description: The target makes a Disease 1 check with an additional for every 2 of your allies in the engagement or becomes infected by a disease with the Contact, Filth, or Wound traits

chaosStar.description: All nurglings in the engagement suffer 1 wound
